review_title: Very Good, but could be better
description: Fast and very intuitive user experience (if the fields are designed properly by the docuement control team in your enterprise)
author: Alan Ernesto S.
pros: Fast access. Very easy way to look for the documents. Easy to upload new documents. Secure and safe information. 24 hours a day working.
cons: Improve the module of reviewing documents, it must be without Java, because Java is too slow and have many troubles, maybe you can do the same as you did in the multi upload module. The team that supports our projects must be people who really worked on real projects all over the world, maybe you need to include some Document Controllers that used Aconex for a long time, and includes they in your company. Most of the people in the support team actually didn't know how a real project work using Aconex.

review_title: Easy to use and great functionality.
description: Aconex helps us work on a global scale with many clients
author: Susan J.
pros: Provides a global platform that allows many user to work together. Easy to add new files to the system. All mail is kept in the Mail module and it can't be erased, so you can't lose any correspondence. Easy to create workflow templates. Easy to run reports on workflows and RFI's. No size limit on the files. It functions like it was advertised and more.
cons: Have to use the mail form titles that Aconex has pre-loaded into the system. Sometimes can get confused when working in the backend of the system where you might need to make a change.

review_title: JV - Aconex Review
description: It is the main player in Oceania. Procore is not much better anyways.
author: Joe V.
pros: Record keeping of all historical project communications.
cons: Platform is dated. Mobile access is bad. Web platform is not responsive and up to modern standards

review_title: Provided easy access to design documentation for review and keeping track of record.
description: Benefits are many as described earlier. Be able to have a process flow of all projects saving time, reducing cost, be able to identify issues and commenting of design documentation.
author: Kam L.
pros: Be able to retrieve documentation easily and support from Aconex is great. It also offered process flow in project delivery which is clear to project teams. The email like within the software is easy to understand for all users and if that person knows how to send an email he or she knows Aconex.
cons: Cannot think of any. However, the cost of the software might be a little pricey. One improvement that I would like to see with the software is a better tagging routine that is able to tagged files and become searchable. Currently searches are still very rudimentary. The BIM viewver tab should also could be improved adding more features to it or better still have a full feature BIM viewer and could reconize RVT as well as Bently 3D files without having to convert to IFCs.

review_title: Successfully configured and implemented Aconex on several large programs.
author: Hans H.
pros: It is the solid single-point-of-truth for large, complex programs. It integrates information flow (correspondence), documents, packaged deliverables, cost, field inspections and BIM together very well. It span from bid/tender phase all the way through design, construction, test/commissioning and close-out. If implemented properly with industry best practice processes, it can significantly reduce risk on large, complex programs, especially those with multiple contract and technical interfaces.
cons: Some of the administration features are somewhat cumbersome on implementations with a large number of users, especially at the organizational administration level. As with any software implementation, training and institutionalization is one of the hardest and most important aspects to be successful. There are a few features (like RFI closeout) that make it a little more difficult to institutionalize such that report data remains in tact.

review_title: The Effective Solution for Project Sheduling.
description: The process reports creation is quick and very useful and the tracking of various projects transactions and expense is very effective. Workflow and task management and also safety management using Oracle Aconex is excellent and productive.
author: Arianna T.
pros: Oracle Aconex delivers the best project management experience and incredible resource planning and accurate project budgets and estimates. It allows easy sharing of Engineering and Construction documents and other files across multiple project Engineers. Ability to monitor employees activities, effective time and cost management product and easy to start using.
cons: This Oracle management product has all easy features and easy to set but the training to those new to Oracle Aconex can take some time.

review_title: Safe storage and access to project documentation from anywhere
author: Mounir Matta - CEng -.
pros: 1- Fast upload and download of documents from anywhere in the world. 2- Peace of mind by ensuring that all project documentation is archived safely. 3- Regular update and development 4- In-house training to users
cons: When searching for a subject yields more than one page and I move from one page to another searching for a particular document, I would like to clearly see the current search page highlighted to enable me to go to the next or previous page without losing track.

review_title: Good software
author: Mohammed A.
pros: easy of finding information for any document or workflow I look for, zip download is easy too to download all files together.
cons: - The relation between documents and workflows is not practical, you should copy the link or text from documents and go to workflows to find information, there should be a way to do that automatically. - If I'm not in the workflow and want to download documents, there is no way except going to the original mail.

review_title: Aconex allows for consistent project coordination and communication to our contractor
author: Robin L.
pros: I really like the fact that the searchability and the document transmission tool that Aconex allows for. The fact that all communication through Aconex forms a permanent project record indefinitely
cons: Getting people to transition off of standard email to Aconex for our overall project communication tool. Team members are resistant to change and new tools.

review_title: great experience, safe and easy to access latest documents.
author: subramanian R.
pros: I am using aconex from 2003 from Dubai to now India great experience. easy to find latest drawings and old documents history. and big document evidence for client or contractor where ever to issued documents.

review_title: Regular Aconex user
description: good, its user friendly and very intuitive.
author: Adnan T.
pros: the ability to see all previous revisions of documents in an organized manner
cons: there are some minor bugs when switching between projects and looking into workflows and packages

review_title: Aconex is a great platform and repository of project documentations.
author: Antonette C.
pros: - Easy to search/find documents especially drawings with the most current versions - The fact that you can see messages from/to other team members is useful when you have large teams especially if a team member leaves the project - Documents and mails cannot be deleted for accuracy of project records - Unlimited project users can be added to use the system once the Organization has registered
cons: - Expensive - Not widely used by Subtrades/Owners so there is more training required. Other systems such as Procore are more widely used and don't require as much training - The fact that messages/notifications can't be grouped as conversations in Outlook makes reading all of the messages very tedious and time consuming - Tracking & closing of RFI's is difficult due to how the status is recorded ie, if the Engineer responds asking for some additional information on an RFI so that they can respond, the system automatically indicated that the RFI has been responded to; it is not possible to generate report in order to know Organizations the RFIs been distributed to using other mail types - Tracking and generating report for received and issued drawings and packages is difficult, it is crucial to be able to have accurate transmittal information that can easily be generated on a daily basis for document management / project records without having the need to maintain a manual log especially for Contractors managing upstream and downstream flow of information (documents from which Organization and to which Organizations the documents have been issued to with complete document and transmittal details)

review_title: Aconex in Document Controller Point ofView
description: Recommendable to use on a massive project
author: Michael John T.
pros: I like Aconex because it gives a wide range of data management procedures that is user friendly and confidential for the project
cons: i guess a broader generation of reports i.e. dashboard layout templates

review_title: Best Managements Project software
description: Aconex upholds development and designing undertakings across numerous industry fragments yet is essentially intended for resource proprietors, engineers, modelers, engineers, general workers for hire, government project workers, weighty/interstate development firms and mining, power, and oil and gas organizations.
author: Emma N.
pros: Aconex is an incredible cooperation device for work process, report and correspondence the board
cons: Broad field reports with benefits and hindrances to highlights, ease of use, worth, and client care.

review_title: Aconex has cut our document processing time in half and provides easy access from anywhere.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Unlimited file size, the information/documents is always received and never lost. Easy to search for documents and able to track changes. Support Central is always available and provide excellent assistance. It is cloud based software which is accessible from any location.
cons: Modules do not interact. Limitations to download multiple files at once. Mail Forms - characters are limited. Bulk Uploads - can't copy file names to Excel without the use of SharePoint.

review_title: Oracle Aconex: An Industry-Leading Project Management Tool
description: Oracle Aconex adequately fills our need for project management and communication between various disciplines from project start to close-out.
author: Clinton P.
pros: + Well organized layout of information. + Integrated mail system that allows for easy multi-discipline collaboration. + Easy to locate documents and mail with multiple search fields. + Multiple file upload tool speeds up transmittal process. + Central project repository (if multiple projects are facilitated through Aconex). + Keeps all issued documents off local hard drives and onto a central server.
cons: - Uploading files with the correct document properties manually can be a chore. - Limited view customization. It would be nice to see a mail item on the same page as the inbox. - You cannot right-click on the screen to open an item in a separate tab. - No constraints on document register standards to ensure all disciplines upload correctly. - Sharp learning curve for new users, requiring extensive training.

review_title: A Sophisicated Software
description: The software links globally between the corporate office and the regional office. The workflow is easier.
author: Marisa O.
pros: Oracle is one of the international platforms which provides a web based applications. The Aconex Workflow function allows you to verify the document review hierarchy. The software provides a global platform that enables multiple users to collaborate. Adding new files to the system is simple. You will not lose any correspondence because all mail is saved in the Mail module and cannot be deleted. Workflow templates are simple to create. There is no file size limit.
cons: The cost of software is extremely high if compare to the local software.

review_title: Very useful tool, easy to use, easy implementation at the start
description: We achieve documentation management of all our projects.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use, simple configuration of the projects, very intuitive , user-friendly, good manage of users
cons: Not enough Reportability to Bid module. Documents search tool seems to be hard at the start It needs continous use to full understanding

review_title: Happy customer
author: Stephanie O.
pros: It was very easy to use and train my employees on .
cons: No issues happy customer likely ti recommend to others
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Wish We Had Oracle Now
author: Cassie K.
pros: We used Oracle in my last position. I have recommended to my new employer and hoping to purchase here too.
cons: There were some areas that weren't so user friendly, but once you got instructed how to perform the task it was seamless.

review_title: Great program for a recent graduate on a Heavy Civil Project to have access to relevant documents
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how the mail and documents sections are organized. Its easy to search for certain documents and follow transmittals to se these documents get reviewed.
cons: Automatic reply E-mails. I'm sure these can be turned off in settings so this isn't an issue. Improvements can be made to the tutorial programs for new users as this program may seem intimidating

review_title: Functional and Cost-Effective Construction Management Platform.
description: Highly effective project workflow easy management and gathering of multiple data reports across various platforms is very quick.
author: Valarie V.
pros: Oracle Aconex features are easy on initial customization and it provides great Engineering and even the best multiple Constructions project management solutions and the easy system to prepare reliable reports. Its data migration capabilities and excellent documentation functions with Oracle Aconex are beneficial and easy scheduling platform.
cons: No much issues from the Oracle Aconex features and as well as its interface is very easy to adapt and configure the tools capabilities.

review_title: Absolutely awful performance, glitches and errors
description: In recent months my experience has been extremely negative. Each day I experience issues regarding speed and errors when trying to do basic tasks like open a correspondence, or upload files. I really would like to use it more because it is a great platform for keeping track of open tasks and correspondence between consultants, but the speed and performance is suffocating.
author: Wenray W.
pros: Good for tracking correspondence and open tasks.
cons: Terrible performance - seriously hinders productivity during the day. Uploading files, loading correspondences and workflows load at snails pace and always unpredictable.

review_title: 5 year user, easy to use, adaptable to project needs.
description: With automated workflows, I am no longer manually routing documents for review, leaving more time for other tasks.
author: Alex G.
pros: I like the multitude of options it provides at a faster speed than most document control software available.
cons: I least like that there is no out of office function. If someone is on vacation, there is not an automated way to divert any workflows sent to them at that time. If someone leaves the project, there is not an automated way to remove them from existing workflows. I have found work arounds.

review_title: The overall use is great for a building site and organising documentation and correspondence.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Documentation and correspondence control. Able to track old correspondence by topic. Able to see who was issued what documentation and when.
cons: Sometimes unstable to use and crashes. It doesn't go back to the same spot if you go back a page. If you have multiple pages open and you search say architectural in one and hydraulic in another. When you go back to the previously used one it changes to the former format. It doesn't stay on the one it was opened too.
